name: ark-panel
description: A self-hosted web panel for OpenClaw

scripts.test:deployment: npm run build && PANEL_ALLOW_DEPLOYMENT_DRY_RUN=1 node dist/src/ops/deployment-smoke.js
scripts.test:paneltest: npm run build && PANEL_ALLOW_PANELTEST_INTEGRATION=1 node dist/src/gateway/paneltest-smoke.js
scripts.test:stream-probe: npm run build && PANEL_ALLOW_STREAM_PROBE=1 node dist/src/gateway/stream-probe.js
scripts.test:app-paneltest: npm run build && PANEL_ALLOW_PANELTEST_INTEGRATION=1 node dist/src/server/paneltest-app-smoke.js
